scripts.setup: ln -sf AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md && ln -sf $CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/server/.env apps/server/.env && ln -sf $CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/macos/.dev-identity apps/macos/.dev-identity && mkdir -p apps/macos/Frameworks && rm -rf apps/macos/Frameworks/GhosttyKit.xcframework && ln -sfn $CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/macos/Frameworks/GhosttyKit.xcframework apps/macos/Frameworks/GhosttyKit.xcframework && bun i
